name: My competitors show up in ChatGPT but I don’t. What am I missing?
description: Competitors usually have better source coverage, clearer pages, or stronger third-party mentions.

mainEntity.name: My competitors show up in ChatGPT but I don’t. What am I missing?

acceptedAnswer.text: If your competitors show up and you do not, study the sources they are being pulled from and build similar credibility signals. That usually means stronger answer-first pages, better directories, and more third-party mentions in the places AI systems already trust.
acceptedAnswer.description: Competitors usually have better source coverage, clearer pages, or stronger third-party mentions.
